nasb.text: Your doom has come to you, O inhabitant of the land. The time has come, the day is near—tumult rather than joyful shouting on the mountains.

esv.text: Your doom has come to you, O inhabitant of the land. The time has come; the day is near, a day of tumult, and not of joyful shouting on the mountains.

cnv.text: 這地的居民哪，災害臨到你了！ 時候到了，日子近了， 是混亂喧嚷的日子，不是山上歡呼的日子。

ccb.text: 以色列境内的居民啊，恶运降临了！时候已到，日子已近，山上一片恐慌，欢乐荡然无存。
